zh.lifeSummary: 當William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt於1357年12月26日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親William Deincourt II31歲，母親Margaret de Welles31歲。他於1379年之前與Alice de Neville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1381年10月在他的家鄉享年23歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍可尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt于1357年12月26日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲William Deincourt II31岁，母亲Margaret de Welles31岁。他于1379年之前与Alice de Neville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1381年10月在他的家乡享年23岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍可尼。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt was born on 26 December 1357, in Leicestershire, England, his father, William Deincourt II, was 31 and his mother, Margaret de Welles, was 31. He married Alice de Neville before 1379. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in October 1381, in his hometown, at the age of 23, and was buried in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt est né le 26 décembre 1357, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Deincourt II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Welles, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Neville avant 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en octobre 1381, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterré à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Middleham, Wensleydale, Yorkshire, Engla: Middleham, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt am 26. Dezember 1357 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Deincourt II 31 und seine Mutter Margaret de Welles 31. Er hat vor 1379 Alice de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb im Oktober 1381 im Alter von 23 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt è nato il il 26 dicembre 1357 nel Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William Deincourt II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Welles, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Neville prima del 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel ottobre 1381, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolto a Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourtが1357年12月26日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Deincourt IIは31歳，母Margaret de Wellesは31歳であった。1379年以前にAlice de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1381年10月に故郷で23歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt(이)가 1357년 12월 26일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Deincourt II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Welles(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1379년 이전 Alice de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1381년 10월 그의 고향에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 블랭니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt nasceu em 26 de dezembro de 1357, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Deincourt II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Welles, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Neville antes 1379. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1381, em sua cidade natal, com 23 anos, e foi sepultado em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt родился 26 декабря 1357 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Deincourt II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Welles, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Neville перед 1379 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер октябрь 1381 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 23 лет и был похоронен в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Deincourt 3rd Baron Deincourt nació el 26 de diciembre de 1357, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Deincourt II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret de Welles, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alice de Neville antes de 1379. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en octubre de 1381, en su pueblo, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultado en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
